reviews.text:
I initially contacted The Fertility & Gynaecology Academy due to a misunderstanding with the contact information I found online. Despite this mix-up, the admin staff was eager to assist, strongly recommending Dr. Amin Gorgy as an exceptional option. Encouraged by their enthusiasm, and after discussing it with my husband, we decided to book an appointment for clinical advice regarding our fertility concerns.

Our appointment began later than planned, highlighting an initial disregard for patient time. Punctuality is crucial to us, and this delay was not a positive start.

During the consultation with Dr. Gorgy, it became evident that there was a lack of empathy towards our situation. The doctor discussed Intrauterine Insemination, emphasising its low success rate, and quoted the treatment at £1,500 to £2,000, which is considerably higher than the £1,100 listed on their website. Similarly, for IVF treatment, he quoted £6,000, significantly above the website's prices of £3,800 for IVF and £4,750 for an IVF-One Cycle Package. This pattern of quoting higher prices than those listed led us to suspect an intentional strategy to increase patient expenditure, undermining our trust in the clinic's transparency and honesty.

Furthermore, when my husband requested a written report of our assessment, Dr. Gorgy informed us that the clinic only provides verbal feedback, denying us any tangible documentation of our consultation. This approach felt dismissive and left us without essential reference material.

My husband was advised to get hormone tests, and the finance team advised us to use their in-house lab for these tests. Before finalizing any decisions, we carefully reviewed the costs involved. In the end, we were confronted with a billing summary of £760, comprising £280 for the consultation and an unexpectedly high £480 for the blood tests. This was in stark contrast to the anticipated costs, especially since the basic hormone blood tests were listed at £70 on their website. Yet, we were quoted £240 under the "Hormone Profile" category, with an additional two tests at £120 each. Given these discrepancies and the lack of clear justification for the extra charges, we decided not to proceed with the blood tests, sensing something fishy in their billing practices. This decision was driven by the dramatic difference in expected versus actual billing, which raised significant concerns about the clinic's transparency and integrity. It appeared as though there was a deliberate attempt to manipulate billing categories for financial gain, indicating a profoundly troubling approach to financial practices.

Our interaction with the admin staff and the accounting team, especially concerning the lab tests, further compounded our decision not to pursue treatment at this clinic. The perceived enthusiasm of the admin staff felt insincere upon leaving, and the pressuring tactics of the accounting team regarding the lab tests were particularly off-putting.

In conclusion, our visit to The Fertility & Gynaecology Academy was disappointing. We encountered a lack of empathy, flexibility, and a respect for our autonomy and time. The inconsistent pricing and the refusal to provide written assessments, coupled with a concerning billing experience, diminished our trust in the clinic. We felt viewed not as individuals in need of support but as potential sources of increased revenue.

Based on our experience, we cannot recommend The Fertility & Gynaecology Academy. We will seek assistance elsewhere, where our health and well-being are prioritised, and transparency is a given.

Me and my partner had a video consultation with the doctor. (She had several treatments done at the clinic before, so the doctor  knows her medical history.) Our agenda of the consultation was to discuss results of tests that were recommended by the doctor. Not to mention that each consolation with the doctor (each time you need to address any question to the doctor) is extremely expensive 170+ pounds. When such a high premium is paid you expect to get a corresponding service. 50% of scheduled 30 min zoom talk both audio and video just froze - we could not hear anything. During the rest of the time we were able to formulate a few questions. Almost none of the questions were answered. Definitely nothing specific, no reasoning at all. When a person claims to be a specialist in a certain field,  immunology in this case, he/she should be able to interpret both clinical history of a patient and results of tests and and at least try to connects the dots - to provide some sort of reasoning, which makes him believe that a certain medication is of a benefit. I didn't get a feeling that a person I was talking to had good knowledge  of immunology. It was rather: try this medication because (we can provide it) and in general it works better than other medications - very business oriented. One of test was LAD - and after some hours of researching and reading replies (that are publicity available) from other doctors to patients with similar test results and clinical history, I'm almost 100% that the doctor didn't even highlight result that were of relevance, but instead pointed to a completely different direction. Luckily for people working in this field there are not so many medications to chose from , and therefore even people with a limited knowledge of the domain can "successfully" operate in this field.

I had a very unfortunate experience of coming across this clinic and its doctors. After i came to terms with the lack of the actual result ; My later regret was combined with both anger for the waste of money but mostly for being given a false hope by what can only be described  a totally unsympathetic and robotic doctor (along with his mismanagement and misadvise on my situation). 3 unsuccessful IVF cycles and money down the drain (where I was charged for the 3rd cycle  that involved nothing but one scan and one "supposed egg extraction" ) I later learnt that they could have just advised against the last IVF cycle completely in order not to waste my money and not to give me the false hope..... We couldn't help it but my husband and I both felt somewhat the "extortion approach" but alas also knew that we were partially to blame for  trusting ourselves into the incompetence of these doctors. My advise to other women out there, do your research promptly and thoroughly before committing to your IFV team....I will add though that some of the less senior members of staff at the clinic were pleasant and understanding....so justly.. i wont say much negative about them...

Really disappointing & distressing experience with Dr. Gorgys clinic- both the service & staff, from start to finish. I travelled from another country to attend an appointment last August 2022. They missed some of the bloods on the day - which can happen but then zero help or support to sort the issue - I was left to arrange the missed bloods in my home country with a third party that they deal with - it was very stressful all round. Spent months trying to get information from FGA around what bloods were carried out on me. 7 months later it is still going on. Am waiting on a partial refund & again zero help. I could write pages on what happened. Anyway, in a nutshell, genuinely shocked at how they carry out (or dont) their business. I would not recommend this clinic on any level.

Update 12/05/2023 in response to Dr. Gorgys Clinic Reply

This response is interesting, given what happened, hence the update - the issue happened in August 2022 and I received ZERO help or support from from Dr. Gorgys Clinc to resolve the problem at that time - as stated in my original review - I was left to sort bloods in my home country & set everything up with no support from Dr. Gorgys clinic for the whole entire process.

This, despite the fact that, again, as referenced in my original review, we traveled to the UK and paid for all services with Dr. Gorgys clinic and just because you outsource part of your services, I, as YOUR customer, was left to deal with this outsourced company directly. Shocking & disappointing.

In addition, your reference to “have been communicating with you ever since to resolve the issue” - you did not communicate to resolve the above issue where we were left for weeks trying to sort the mess & issue with bloods. What you did communicate on was the minor issue of a partial refund, at a much later stage, when we had been left to sort the actual problems on our own.
In addition, the apology you reference as made was - an apology on behalf of the 3rd party - I have no record of where Dr. Gorgys clinic took responsibility or apologised for anything themselves.

We were supposed to have a first consultation with them. We arrived and was left to wait in the communal hallway for over 20mins even though we repeatedly knocked and could see two staff on the other side of the door. When they eventually let us in the man was unapologetic and nonchalantly pointed to the waiting area and chucked the registration forms for us to fill in. I was already stressed and anxious as this would be our third time trying. I was tearful and frustrated with the poor attitude so my husband and I left. The doctor rang an hour later to apolgise about the poor treatment but the damage and first impression was already done. To top it off they actually charged me for the terrible encounter and I have been trying to get a refund ever since! Word of advice hire staff who are empathetic as fertility is such a delicate emotive subject. I have selected another clinic's services.

BE CAREFUL! I donated my eggs in this Clinic over a year ago.
They are very unprofessional and rude.
I ended up in A&E with OHSS because of them and my life was at risk.
I'm in process of reporting this clinic and especially Dr. G who has over stimulated my eggs and tried to get away with it when I started to feel unwell and ended up in the hospital.
And okay maybe they helped women to get pregnant and have their dream baby but the way they treat us - donors is shocking and had a big impact on my physical and mental health. I will never forgive you.

I have had two treatments of IUI with Dr. Gorgy after someone I knew had a number of treatments with him. Unfortunately, we don't exactly share the same experience and I can relate to the other reviews that the whole experience is very money driven.

Dr. Gorgy takes very little into account your past history and hardly writes down any notes or remembers anything from previous appointments. This is something i was prepped for by my friend who attended the clinic, so I knew to write a diary for each appointment.

I had one cycle of IUI with Gorgy which all went well and all to plan, however no pregnancy at no fault of the clinic. Sadly the second cycle did not go as well, where he completely missed my ovulation by a couple days. Somehow I was convinced to proceed with my IUI, and out of desperation I agreed. I felt mislead as the chances are actually known to be very small when performing IUI a couple days after ovulation which was not mentioned on the day.

During this cycle I ended up hyperstimulated and suspected for an ectopic pregnancy for an event that happened prior to this IUI. I notified the nurses that I was going away around this period and no advice was given not to travel when I was due to fly 7 hours overseas. Had my pregnancy turned out to be ectopic I might have died mid flight.

Unfortunately, while abroad I ended up in hospital due illness from being hyperstimuled and also underwent investigations for an ectopic pregenancy which turned out to be negative. From the experience I found it really amazing how the medical clinic treating me did not advise me not to travel when I mentioned it to them, particularly when it comes to potentially life threatening issues.

Another review mentions the Dr. being late, I can vouch for this as on three occasions I arrived for an ultrasound over my two treatments with Dr. Gorgy not being there that day when promised and then and just passively sent for a blood test alone.

Personally, I found the majority of the staff apart from Jeana a bit ignorant. On a number of occasions I had texted the nurses during my miscarriage and they did not reply back to my texts.

Lastly, a particularly uncomfortable situation being sent into a basement for payment each session where the staff don't have the courtesy to even look you in the eye. I felt like that handing over a couple thousand was a nuisance to them.

Since I've had treatment with the NHS and I can hands down say that the treatment is ten folds better. Sadly, I won't be recommending this clinic as I felt there was serious lack of care.

Extremely poor service. First I called and ask if I can book an appointment for test and I was told “yes” and the receptionist book me for the test and even made me pay a deposit. After one hour she called me back saying she  did a mistake and first I need to have a consultation and then the test... but instead of giving me an option to have my money back since she took deposit for a service they don't offer, she told me that I can still go for the test first and have a consultation later on... which it doesn't make sense but anyway I was desperate to do the test so I agreed. So I went there at 12h(my appointment ) and waited there almost 40min to find out that I will have a consultation instead of a test. I’ve paid £570 for the test and consultation and I was told that the results will be ready in 3-4weeks. 5 weeks later, no one contacted me so I decided to give them a call, they told me to send an email, I’ve sent one and I am still waiting for response.....one week.... One week for a response... response which simply could be “we are sorry but there is a delay with your test” But... NO, they are not even bothered to get back to me. So much money for such a disrespectful service, I will not continue with the rest of the tests I was offered by them as they are not reliable!

I cannot unfortunately recommend this place. Dr Gorgy charged us £230 for a consultation, which resulted only in him providing the complete pricelist for his services, none of our history was analysed, and no specific or useful recommendations were made - instead just a recommendation that we try a bit of everything and we can decide on what to prioritise. This "consultation" could have lasted less than fifteen minutes if he'd had his way. Nothing was explained, just the technical names of tests were listed off. I insisted on asking for explanations, which were still unclear and ultimately not useful. I'd recommend avoiding this place.

very disappointed after a series of expensive tests, they gave me a medication that was not suitable for me, which other doctors have confirmed,
they do not explain why they are giving you the medication and what effects it has. I paid a significant amount of money for nothing . Avoid it please
Pleaae do not respond to my low rating stating im not a patient. My wife and I are both registered. …

Dr. Gorgy does not belong to the category of practitioners who genuinely want to help you and provide serious care. He is neither ethical nor professional, and above all, he has absolutely no respect for the couples he sees. He exploits the …

Very money orientated and doctor constantly late.
Doctor not showing up at time of egg collection with 2 patients in front of me... Never had a scan before going into theatre to check if follicles were still there. Was told my eggs did not fertilize. This is the only clinic where my eggs did not fertilize...  and it happened twice.
